span.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent; font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; text-decoration: none; font-size: 24px;
font-size: 13pt; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; text-decoration: none;
background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; text-decoration: none;
span.font: Tailored specifically for the world of creativity, this Odoo industry package offers a complete solution for arts and crafts stores. It effectively manages a diverse range of inventory with complex variants, ensuring that you can always meet customer demand for specific colors or materials. The system integrates powerful tools for POS and eCommerce, making it easier to run your store efficiently both online and offline. It is the essential tool for combining artistic passion with professional business management.

template.p: By uploading this module's demo data, your database has been filled with a few contacts.
To get a rapid understanding of the processes this Odoo package offers, you can execute the following flows and configure the settings to suit your Arts & Crafts Store.
Of course, this is just an overview of the features included in this package. Feel free to add new apps, delete/modify demo data, and test everything around!

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-warning pb-0 pt-3

div.p: You didn't import demo data? You can still do it. Go to Apps > Industries > Upgrade your Arts & Crafts Store package and select the relevant checkbox

template.p: Manage your entire customer database and view individual profiles to take direct action from the contact module.

li.p: Track Promotion Eligibility: Instantly see exactly which active rewards and promotional programs a specific customer can access.
Generate Membership Barcodes: Link a unique barcode to a customer’s digital or physical membership card for seamless scanning at your Point of Sale (POS).

template.p: From the Sales App

li.p: Centralize Rewards: Effortlessly build, monitor, and manage your entire ecosystem of loyalty campaigns and promotional programs from one dashboard.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3

div.p: Ready to take it a step further? Explore the Membership and Pricelists features to easily manage exclusive pricing for your members.

template.p: Odoo enables complete control over your product catalog and basic stock management, ensuring your inventory data is always accurate.
Start by creating your products within the Products tab, filling in all necessary details. The system uses three distinct categories to provide maximum flexibility across your business:

li.p: Product Category: For internal tracking and reporting.
E-commerce Category: For easier product retrieval by customers on your online store.
Point of Sale Category: For organizing transactions within your shop system.
Accurately update the inventoried quantity.
Decide whether to allow sales of out-of-stock products.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3

div.p: The current setup keeps things simple by using basic product counts to track stock. If you need more power, the Inventory app introduces advanced features like barcode scanning, location tracking, and serial number management.
Note: Increased capability leads to higher complexity and more maintenance.

Our Advice: Stick with your current streamlined configuration until you’re fully comfortable. When you're ready to upgrade, try the Inventory module on a duplicated database first to ensure it fits your workflow. 😉

template.p: Odoo’s Point of Sale (POS) system ensures fast and smooth transactions in your shop.

ul.li: To start an order in your Point of Sale (POS) session, scan or select all items.
Select the customer to apply the appropriate coupons.

li.p: Accept multiple payment options: cash, card, and mobile payments.
Generate printed or digital receipts for customers.

template.p: Your E-commerce setup involves three main areas: Product Settings, Website-Wide Settings, and Payment & Delivery Methods.

li.p: Publishing: Each product can be published independently on your online store.
Product-Level Settings: Define core product settings directly on the product form.
Layout Settings: Adjust the visual presentation and layout of products using the website editor.
Navigate to Website Settings to configure global e-commerce policies.

Crucial Review: You must review all e-commerce settings to ensure they align with your internal business policies (e.g., when invoices are generated, whether a mandatory customer check-in is required for ordering, etc.).

template.p: Use the Website > Configuration menu to enable all your transaction options.

li.p: Payment Providers & Methods: Go to Website > Configuration > Payment Providers and install all the payment methods and payment providers you plan to offer (e.g., credit card processors, PayPal, etc.).
Delivery Methods: Go to Website > Configuration > Delivery Methods to define all available options and their costs.
External Providers: Check if a predefined Odoo connection exists if you work with specific shipping carriers.
In-Store Pickup (Click & Collect): If you wish to offer this, you must activate the setting within the Website Settings first.

template.p: Track and oversee your entire procurement workflow directly within the Purchase App. The moment you confirm a receipt, your stock levels update automatically.

Want to automate your purchasing? > Integrate the Inventory App to unlock automated reordering. Keep in mind while expanding your ecosystem provides much greater capability, it also introduces more advanced configurations to manage.
Connecting the Event App with Email Marketing gives you a powerful toolkit to launch events and drive registrations simultaneously.
Set your event logistics and rules in just a few clicks:

li.p: Logistics & Pricing: Define ticket prices, event times, and capacity limits.
Registration & Launch: Choose how attendees sign up and publish the event page directly to your website.

template.p: Turn your contact database into an audience:

li.p: Targeted Outbound: Launch promotional campaigns tailored to specific mailing lists.
Direct Redirection: Embed high-converting call-to-action (CTA) buttons that send readers straight to your event registration page.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3

div.p: Ready to scale your reach? Explore the SMS Marketing, Social Marketing, and Marketing Automation apps to build advanced, multi-channel campaigns.

template.p: Build an online presence that adapts perfectly to your clients' needs. Odoo gives you the flexibility to easily integrate internal policies, customize forms, showcase your latest products, and so much more—no coding required.
Want to share industry insights or boost your SEO? Easily add a beautifully designed blog. Odoo’s website ecosystem offers endless layout and design options for a fully customized look and feel.
template.h3: 🔄 Connect Your Front-End to Your Pipeline
template.p: Your website doesn't just sit there—it actively helps to grow your business.

li.p: Automated Lead Generation: Every submission on your "Contact Us" page instantly creates a brand-new opportunity in your CRM App.
From the CRM app: Track client interactions in real time and use the Sales App to quickly send tailored quotations for B2B leads or custom customer requests.

h1.strong: Do you want to go further?

template.p: Once your core operations are running smoothly, consider expanding your toolset:
Want to do more?

li.p: Accounting: Automatically log payments, close sessions, and generate tax reports.

ul.li: Payroll: Use this feature to handle employee salaries and manage holiday requests.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: Would you like to discuss your Odoo setup with us or go even further?
